attrval.textval: The PRO Screwdrivers are effective hand tools for professionals in various trades who need to complete screwdriving tasks.

cltextval.clText2000: The PRO Screwdrivers are effective hand tools for professionals in various trades who need to complete screwdriving tasks.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: When you need to complete a lot of screwdriving tasks, the last thing you want is stripped screws or broken screwdriver shafts. We designed our robust PRO Screwdriver Hexagon to make sure you can get any heavy-duty screwdriving job done with ease and no interruptions.

cltextval.clText2000: When you need to complete a lot of screwdriving tasks, the last thing you want is stripped screws or broken screwdriver shafts. We designed our robust PRO Screwdriver Hexagon to make sure you can get any heavy-duty screwdriving job done with ease and no interruptions.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The shaft of PRO Screwdrivers Hexagon is made from S2 steel and withstands high torque. The screwdrivers have precise tip with black phosphate coating to keep screws in place and make them easier to see. The handle with hard-wearing soft-grip areas helps you get outstanding power transfer – with less strain on your hand. The hexagonal handle front prevents the screwdriver from rolling off. Type and size indications and colour-coding on the handle help you pick out the screwdriver you need – right away.

cltextval.clText2000: The PRO Stubby Screwdrivers are effective hand tools for professionals in various trades who need to complete screwdriving tasks.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: When you need to complete a lot of screwdriving tasks in tight spaces, the last thing you want is stripped screws or broken screwdriver shafts. We designed our robust PRO Stubby Screwdrivers Phillips to make sure you can get any heavy-duty screwdriving job done with ease and no interruptions.

cltextval.clText2000: When you need to complete a lot of screwdriving tasks in tight spaces, the last thing you want is stripped screws or broken screwdriver shafts. We designed our robust PRO Stubby Screwdrivers Phillips to make sure you can get any heavy-duty screwdriving job done with ease and no interruptions.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The shaft of PRO Stubby Screwdrivers Phillips is made from S2 steel and withstands the torque up to 40% above the ISO 8764 standard. The compact, stubby design with a 25-mm shaft helps you work in confined, hard-to-reach areas. The screwdrivers have precise tip with black phosphate coating to keep screws in place and make them easier to see. The handle with hard-wearing soft-grip areas helps you get outstanding power transfer – with less strain on your hand. The handle front prevents the screwdriver from rolling off. Type and size indications and colour-coding on the handle help you pick out the screwdriver you need right away.

cltextval.clText2000: The shaft of PRO Stubby Screwdrivers Phillips is made from S2 steel and withstands the torque up to 40% above the ISO 8764 standard. The screwdrivers have precise tip with black phosphate coating to keep screws in place and make them easier to see. The handle with hard-wearing soft-grip areas helps you get outstanding power transfer – with less strain on your hand. The handle front prevents the screwdriver from rolling off. Type and size indications and colour-coding on the handle help you pick out the screwdriver you need right away.

attrval.textval: Designed to magnetize and demagnetize screwdrivers

attrval.textval: For magnetizing and demagnetizing screwdrivers, eg when driving screws in tight spaces

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Short Text
attrval.textval: Designed to help professionals magnetize and demagnetize screwdrivers faster

cltextval.clText2000: Designed to help professionals magnetize and demagnetize screwdrivers faster

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Long Text
attrval.textval: The PRO Magnetizer/Demagnetizer is a well-designed tool for professionals who want to magnetize their screwdrivers and work more effciently.

cltextval.clText2000: The PRO Magnetizer/Demagnetizer is a well-designed tool for professionals who want to magnetize their screwdrivers and work more effciently.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: When you need to drive screws in tight, hard-to-reach spots, a screwdriver that can hold them in place makes the job easier. With the PRO Magnetizer/Demagnetizer, you can instantly magnetize – and demagnetize – your screwdriver by simply passing it through the right slot.

cltextval.clText2000: When you need to drive screws in tight, hard-to-reach spots, a screwdriver that can hold them in place makes the job easier. With the PRO Magnetizer/Demagnetizer, you can instantly magnetize – and demagnetize – your screwdriver by simply passing it through the right slot.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The PRO Magnetizer/Demagnetizer is a well-designed tool that helps you quickly and effectively magnetize – and demagnetize – your standard screwdrivers. Its magnetic walls charge the screwdriver tip, giving you a strong hold on screws whenever you need it.

cltextval.clText2000: The PRO Magnetizer/Demagnetizer is a well-designed tool that helps you quickly and effectively magnetize – and demagnetize – your standard screwdrivers. Its magnetic walls charge the screwdriver tip, giving you a strong hold on screws whenever you need it.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)

cltextval.clText2000: When you need to complete a lot of screwdriving tasks, the last thing you want is stripped screws or broken screwdriver shafts. We designed our robust PRO Bit Screwdriver to make sure you can get any heavy-duty screwdriving job done with ease and no interruptions.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The shaft of PRO Bit Screwdrivers is made from chrome-vanadium steel and withstands the torque up to 36 Nm. The screwdrivers’ strong magnetic bit holder keeps bits securely in place. The handle with hard-wearing soft-grip areas helps you get outstanding power transfer – with less strain on your hand. The handle front prevents the screwdriver from rolling off.

attrval.textval: The PRO T-Handle Bit Screwdriver is an effective hand tool for professionals in various trades who need to complete screwdriving tasks.

cltextval.clText2000: The PRO T-Handle Bit Screwdriver is an effective hand tool for professionals in various trades who need to complete screwdriving tasks.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: When you need to complete a lot of screwdriving tasks, the last thing you want is stripped screws or broken screwdriver shafts. We designed our robust PRO T-Handle Bit Screwdriver to make sure you can get any heavy-duty screwdriving job done with ease and no interruptions.

cltextval.clText2000: When you need to complete a lot of screwdriving tasks, the last thing you want is stripped screws or broken screwdriver shafts. We designed our robust PRO T-Handle Bit Screwdriver to make sure you can get any heavy-duty screwdriving job done with ease and no interruptions.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The shaft of PRO T-Handle Bit Screwdriver is made from chrome-vanadium steel and withstands the torque up to 36 Nm. The shaft is 100 mm long to allow you to access hard-to-reach areas. The screwdrivers’ strong magnetic bit holder keeps screwdriver bits securely in place. The T-handle with hardwearing soft-grip areas helps you get outstanding power transfer – with more control over the tool and less strain on your hand. The handle front prevents the screwdriver from rolling off. Thanks to the tether hole, you can keep the tool attached to prevent it from falling when you work at heights.

cltextval.clText2000: The shaft of PRO T-Handle Bit Screwdriver is made from chrome-vanadium steel and withstands the torque up to 36 Nm. The shaft is 100 mm long to allow you to access hard-to-reach areas. The screwdrivers’ strong magnetic bit holder keeps screwdriver bits securely in place. The T-handle with hardwearing soft-grip areas helps you get outstanding power transfer – with more control over the tool and less strain on your hand. The handle front prevents the screwdriver from rolling off. Thanks to the tether hole, you can keep the tool attached to prevent it from falling when you work at heights.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: When you need to complete a lot of screwdriving tasks in tight spaces, the last thing you want is stripped screws or broken screwdriver shafts. We designed our robust PRO Stubby Bit Screwdriver to make sure you can get any heavy-duty screwdriving job done with ease and no interruptions.

cltextval.clText2000: When you need to complete a lot of screwdriving tasks in tight spaces, the last thing you want is stripped screws or broken screwdriver shafts. We designed our robust PRO Stubby Bit Screwdriver to make sure you can get any heavy-duty screwdriving job done with ease and no interruptions.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The shaft of PRO Bit Screwdrivers is made from chrome-vanadium steel and withstands the torque up to 36 Nm. The compact, stubby design with a 25-mm shaft makes them perfect for working in confined, hard-to-reach areas. The screwdrivers’ strong magnetic bit holder keeps bits securely in place. The handle with hard-wearing soft-grip areas helps you get outstanding power transfer – with less strain on your hand. The handle front prevents the screwdriver from rolling off.

cltextval.clText2000: The shaft of PRO Bit Screwdrivers is made from chrome-vanadium steel and withstands the torque up to 36 Nm. The compact, stubby design with a 25-mm shaft makes them perfect for working in confined, hard-to-reach areas. The screwdrivers’ strong magnetic bit holder keeps bits securely in place. The handle with hard-wearing soft-grip areas helps you get outstanding power transfer – with less strain on your hand. The handle front prevents the screwdriver from rolling off.

cltextval.clText2000: The PRO Precision Screwdrivers are effective hand tools for professionals in various trades who need to complete precision screwdriving tasks.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: When you need to complete a lot of precise screwdriving tasks, the last thing you want is stripped screws or broken screwdriver shafts. We designed our robust PRO Precision Bit Screwdriver to make sure you can get any precision screwdriving job done with ease and no interruptions.

cltextval.clText2000: When you need to complete a lot of precise screwdriving tasks, the last thing you want is stripped screws or broken screwdriver shafts. We designed our robust PRO Precision Bit Screwdriver to make sure you can get any precision screwdriving job done with ease and no interruptions.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The shaft of PRO Precision Screwdrivers is made from S2 steel and withstands the torque 40% above ISO 8764 and ISO 2380 standards. The screwdrivers have precise tip with black phosphate coating to keep screws in place and make them easier to see. The slim handle with soft-grip areas helps you get more control over the tool with less strain on your hand. The handle with hexagonal rotating cap prevents the screwdrivers from rolling off. Type and size indications and colour-coding on the handle help you pick out the screwdriver you need right away.

cltextval.clText2000: The Adjustable Wrench is a reliable hand tool for professionals in various trades who need to fasten and loosen nuts and bolts.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: A robust and well-designed adjustable wrench helps you complete your fastening jobs with less strain. That's why we have our Adjustable Wrench – designed for strength and high power transfer from hand to tool.

cltextval.clText2000: A robust and well-designed adjustable wrench helps you complete your fastening jobs with less strain. That's why we have our Adjustable Wrench – designed for strength and high power transfer from hand to tool.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: Thanks to a powerful jaw structure and comfortable handle with soft grip, our Adjustable Wrench allows professionals to get high power transfer to the tool with minimum strain on your hand. We made it from carbon steel for strength and durability. The wrench features metric graduation helping you adjust it to the nut or bolt size. The handle features a tether hole for attaching the tool.

cltextval.clText2000: Thanks to a powerful jaw structure and comfortable handle with soft grip, our Adjustable Wrench allows professionals to get high power transfer to the tool with minimum strain on your hand. We made it from carbon steel for strength and durability. The wrench features metric graduation helping you adjust it to the nut or bolt size. The handle features a tether hole for attaching the tool.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: A robust and well-designed combination wrench helps you complete your fastening jobs with less strain. That's why we have our Combination Wrench – designed for strength and high power transfer from hand to tool.

cltextval.clText2000: A robust and well-designed combination wrench helps you complete your fastening jobs with less strain. That's why we have our Combination Wrench – designed for strength and high power transfer from hand to tool.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: We made our Combination Wrench from chrome-vanadium steel for strength and wear resistance. The wrench’s material and ergonomic design help you get high power transfer with minimal strain on your hand. The closed-loop, box-end side with 15° angle for tight spaces provides a strong grip on fasteners whenever you need higher torque. The open-end is ideal for working in tight spots and quickly handling fasteners that aren’t fully tightened.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: We designed the ring gear of the Ratchet Combination Wrench using our powder metallurgy technology to make sure it withstands high torque and offers good power transfer. The tool is made from chrome-vanadium steel for strength and resistance to wear. The wrench’s material and ergonomic design help you get high power transfer with minimal strain on your hand. The closed-loop, box-end side with 5° angle for tight spaces provides a strong grip on fasteners whenever you need higher torque. The open-end is ideal for working in tight spots and quickly handling fasteners that aren’t fully tightened.

attrval.textval: We made our Combination Wrench from chrome-vanadium steel for strength and wear resistance. The wrench’s material and ergonomic design help you get high power transfer with minimal strain on your hand. The closed-loop, box-end side with 15° angle for tight spaces provides a strong grip on fasteners whenever you need higher torque. The open-end is ideal for working in tight spots and quickly handling fasteners that aren’t fully tightened.

The open-end is ideal for working in tight spots and quickly handling fasteners that aren’t fully tightened.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: A robust and well-designed adjustable wrench helps you complete your fastening jobs with less strain. That's why we have our Adjustable Wrench – designed for strength and high power transfer from hand to tool.

cltextval.clText2000: A robust and well-designed adjustable wrench helps you complete your fastening jobs with less strain. That's why we have our Adjustable Wrench – designed for strength and high power transfer from hand to tool.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: Thanks to a powerful jaw structure and comfortable handle with soft grip, our Adjustable Wrench allows professionals to get high power transfer to the tool with minimum strain on your hand. We made it from carbon steel for strength and durability. The wrench features metric graduation helping you adjust it to the nut or bolt size you’re working on. The handle features a tether hole for attaching the tool.

attrval.textval: A robust and well-designed combination wrench helps you complete your fastening jobs with less strain. That's why we have our Ratchet Combination Wrench – designed for strength and high power transfer from hand to tool.

cltextval.clText2000: A robust and well-designed combination wrench helps you complete your fastening jobs with less strain. That's why we have our Ratchet Combination Wrench – designed for strength and high power transfer from hand to tool.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: We designed the ring gear of the Ratchet Combination Wrenches using our powder metallurgy technology to make sure it withstands high torque and offers good power transfer. The tool is made from chrome-vanadium steel for strength and resistance to wear. The wrench’s material and ergonomic design help you get high power transfer with minimal strain on your hand. The closed-loop, box-end side with 5° angle for tight spaces provides a strong grip on fasteners whenever you need higher torque. The open-end is ideal for working in tight spots and quickly handling fasteners that aren’t fully tightened.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: Cutting steel rebar with bonded cutting discs isn’t always the best option. That’s why we have our PRO Steel Rebar Cutter Circular Saw Blade. It’s designed to help you cut rebars more efficiently, without sparks or fumes.

cltextval.clText2000: Cutting steel rebar with bonded cutting discs isn’t always the best option. That’s why we have our PRO Steel Rebar Cutter Circular Saw Blade. It’s designed to help you cut rebars more efficiently, without sparks or fumes.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: Thanks to its strong carbide teeth, the PRO Steel Rebar Cutter Circular Saw Blade allows construction workers to cut through rebar quickly. Its special tooth design prevents sparks and fumes, making your work safer. Expansion slots efficiently dissipate heat, extending the ciruclar saw blade’s lifespan.

cltextval.clText2000: Thanks to its strong carbide teeth, the PRO Steel Rebar Cutter Circular Saw Blade allows construction workers to cut through rebar quickly. Am besten geeignet für Zimmerer und Schreiner

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Long Text
attrval.textval: The EXPERT Extended Magazine is a great accessory for carpenters and joiners who fasten wood with the EXPERT EXNH18V-90 MR/R 21° Framing Nailer.

cltextval.clText2000: The EXPERT Extended Magazine is a great accessory for carpenters and joiners who fasten wood with the EXPERT EXNH18V-90 MR/R 21° Framing Nailer.
Das EXPERT Extended Magazine ist ein hervorragendes Zubehör für Zimmerer und Schreiner, die Holz mit dem EXPERT EXNH18V-90 MR/R 21° Framing Nailer befestigen.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: Having more nails in your nail gun allows you to complete any nailing job without reloading your nail gun too often. The EXPERT Extended Magazine is an ideal solution for busy carpenters or joiners who work on a variety of demanding projects and want to get the job done more efficiently, with fewer interruptions.

cltextval.clText2000: Having more nails in your nail gun allows you to complete any nailing job without reloading your nail gun too often. The EXPERT Extended Magazine is an ideal solution for busy carpenters or joiners who work on a variety of demanding projects and want to get the job done more efficiently, with fewer interruptions.

Mehr Nägel im Nagler ermöglichen dir, jede Befestigungsarbeit auszuführen, ohne den Nagler ständig neu laden zu müssen. Das EXPERT Extended Magazine ist die ideale Lösung für vielbeschäftigte Zimmerer oder Schreiner, die an verschiedenen anspruchsvollen Projekten arbeiten und ihre Aufgaben effizienter mit weniger Unterbrechungen erledigen möchten.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: When you need to build wooden frames or complete any other nailing task, thanks to the EXPERT Extended Magazine, you can work more efficiently, with fewer interruptions.

cltextval.clText2000: When you need to build wooden frames or complete any other nailing task, thanks to the EXPERT Extended Magazine, you can work more efficiently, with fewer interruptions.
Wenn du Holzrahmen bauen oder andere Nagelarbeiten erledigen musst, kannst du dank des EXPERT Extended Magazine effizienter und mit weniger Unterbrechungen arbeiten.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 3 (Call to action)
attrval.textval: The EXPERT Extended Magazine is a great accessory for professionals who want to increase the number of nails in their nail guns. The magazine is the perfect match for our EXPERT EXNH18V-90 MR/R 21° Framing Nailer. You can mount it on and detach from the power tool with ease. The extended magazine can hold 65 nails collated at a 21-degree angle, between 50 and 90 mm long.

cltextval.clText2000: The EXPERT Extended Magazine is a great accessory for professionals who want to increase the number of nails in their nail guns. The magazine is the perfect match for our EXPERT EXNH18V-90 MR/R 21° Framing Nailer. You can mount it on and detach from the power tool with ease. The extended magazine can hold 65 nails collated at a 21-degree angle, between 50 and 90 mm long.

Das EXPERT Extended Magazine ist ein hervorragendes Zubehör für Profis, die die Anzahl der Nägel in ihrem Nagler erhöhen möchten. Das Magazin ist die perfekte Ergänzung zu unserem EXPERT EXNH18V-90 MR/R 21° Framing Nailer. Du kannst es mühelos am Elektrowerkzeug montieren und wieder abnehmen. Das verlängerte Magazin fasst 65 Nägel mit 21-Grad-Winkelung und einer Länge von 50 bis 90 mm.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: Need replacement filters for your Bosch vacuum cleaner? User our reliable Flat Pleated Filters.

cltextval.clText2000: Need replacement filters for your Bosch vacuum cleaner? User our reliable Flat Pleated Filters.
Benötigst du Ersatzfilter für deinen Bosch Staubsauger? Nutze unsere zuverlässigen Flachfaltenfilter.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: Bosch EPA Flat Pleated Filters are rectangular replacement filters for Bosch GAS 12-25 LS vacuum cleaners. They are made from cellulose and offer high suction power, durability, and resistance to rot. The filters provide a filtration efficiency of at least 85%, helping you remove fine dust effectively.

cltextval.clText2000: Bosch EPA Flat Pleated Filters are rectangular replacement filters for Bosch GAS 12-25 LS vacuum cleaners. They are made from cellulose and offer high suction power, durability, and resistance to rot. The filters provide a filtration efficiency of at least 85%, helping you remove fine dust effectively.

Bosch EPA Flachfaltenfilter sind rechteckige Ersatzfilter für Bosch GAS 12-25 LS Staubsauger. Sie bestehen aus Zellulose und bieten hohe Saugleistung, Langlebigkeit und Verrottungsbeständigkeit. Die Filter bieten eine Filtrationseffizienz von mindestens 85 % und helfen dir, Feinstaub effektiv zu entfernen.

attrval.name: Benefit HL (short)
attrval.textval: Pick and Click set for all standard screwdriving tasks

cltextval.clText2000: Pick and Click set for all standard screwdriving tasks
Pick and Click-Set für alle Standard-Schraubarbeiten

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: All bits in the set have 1/4″ Hex shank for use with three-jaw drill driver chucks and hexagonal drill driver chucks.

cltextval.clText2000: All bits in the set have 1/4″ Hex shank for use with three-jaw drill driver chucks and hexagonal drill driver chucks.
Alle Bits im Set haben einen 1/4‑Zoll-Sechskantschaft zur Verwendung mit Dreibacken-Bohrschrauberfuttern und Sechskant-Bohrschrauberfuttern.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The Extra Hard Set, 50 pcs contains all standard bits you need to get your screwdriving tasks done. The screwdriver bits are made from heat-treated S2 modified steel for hardness and resistance to wear. They are colour-coded so that you can pick out the right bit easier. The set is housed in a robust Pick and Click case you can use to build your own toolbox and keep your bits well organised and protected. It includes a magnetic screwdriver handle for holding bits securely and a bit holder to help you complete your tasks with ease.

cltextval.clText2000: The Extra Hard Set, 50 pcs contains all standard bits you need to get your screwdriving tasks done. The screwdriver bits are made from heat-treated S2 modified steel for hardness and resistance to wear. They are colour-coded so that you can pick out the right bit easier. The set is housed in a robust Pick and Click case you can use to build your own toolbox and keep your bits well organised and protected. It includes a magnetic screwdriver handle for holding bits securely and a bit holder to help you complete your tasks with ease.

Das Extra Hard Set, 50‑tlg. beinhaltet alle Standardbits, die du für Schraubarbeiten benötigst. Die Schrauberbits bestehen aus wärmebehandeltem, S2-modifiziertem Stahl für Härte und Verschleißfestigkeit. Sie sind farbcodiert, damit du das richtige Bit einfacher findest. Das Set ist in einem robusten Pick and Click-Koffer untergebracht, damit du deinen eigenen Werkzeugkasten zusammenstellen und deine Bits gut organisiert und geschützt aufbewahren kannst. Es enthält einen magnetischen Schraubendrehergriff, der die Bits sicher hält, und einen Bithalter, sodass Sie Ihre Aufgaben mit Leichtigkeit erledigen können.

attrval.textval: For driving hex screws, bolts, and nuts

attrval.textval: For driving hex screws, bolts, and nuts in heavy-duty applications

cltextval.clText2000: For driving hex screws, bolts, and nuts in heavy-duty applications
Für die Verwendung mit Sechskantschrauben, Bolzen und Muttern bei härtestem Einsatz

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Short Text
attrval.textval: Highly efficient for installers, electricians, metalworkers, and woodworkers: Robust

cltextval.clText2000: Highly efficient for installers, electricians, metalworkers, and woodworkers: Robust
Äußerst effizient für Installateure, Elektriker, Metall- und Holzarbeiter: Robust

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Long Text
attrval.textval: The PRO Impact Socket Set is made for installers, electricians, metalworkers, and woodworkers who need sockets to help them with their heavy-duty screwdriving tasks.

cltextval.clText2000: The PRO Impact Socket Set is made for installers, electricians, metalworkers, and woodworkers who need sockets to help them with their heavy-duty screwdriving tasks.
Das PRO Steckschlüssel Set ist ausgelegt für Installateure, Elektriker, Metall‑ und Holzarbeiter, die Steckschlüsseleinsätze für anspruchsvolle Schraubarbeiten benötigen.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: You can use the PRO Impact Socket Set to handle hex screws, bolts, and nuts with your square-drive wrench. We designed it to help you with screwdriving tasks in plant installations or other types of heavy industrial work.

cltextval.clText2000: You can use the PRO Impact Socket Set to handle hex screws, bolts, and nuts with your square-drive wrench. We designed it to help you with screwdriving tasks in plant installations or other types of heavy industrial work.

Du kannst das PRO Steckschlüssel Set für Sechskantschrauben, Bolzen und Muttern mit deinem Schraubenschlüssel mit Vierkantantrieb verwenden. Wir haben es für Schraubarbeiten bei umfangreichen Montagen oder andere anspruchsvolle Industriearbeiten entwickelt.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: We made the sockets in the PRO Impact Socket Set from heat-treated CRMO (chrome-molybdenum) steel and gave them thick walls to make sure they resist high torque. We added a black phosphate coating to protect them from rust and corrosion. The sockets are laser-marked and colour-coded so that you can see the one you need right away. They feature a groove and a through hole for securing them on your impact wrench, using our pin and ring – whenever you need an extra strong hold. The adapters allow you to use the sockets with impact drivers and hex bits with impact wrenches for any lighter tasks below 80 Nm torque.

cltextval.clText2000: We made the sockets in the PRO Impact Socket Set from heat-treated CRMO (chrome-molybdenum) steel and gave them thick walls to make sure they resist high torque. We added a black phosphate coating to protect them from rust and corrosion. The sockets are laser-marked and colour-coded so that you can see the one you need right away. They feature a groove and a through hole for securing them on your impact wrench, using our pin and ring – whenever you need an extra strong hold. The adapters allow you to use the sockets with impact drivers and hex bits with impact wrenches for any lighter tasks below 80 Nm torque.

Das PRO Steckschlüssel Set besteht aus wärmebehandeltem CRMO(Chrom-Molybdän)-Stahl und ist dank der dicken Wände sehr widerstandsfähig gegenüber hohen Drehmomenten. Die schwarze Phosphatbeschichtung schützt es vor Rost und Korrosion. Die Steckschlüsseleinsätze sind mit einem Laser beschriftet und farbcodiert, damit du den richtigen auf den ersten Blick findest. Sie verfügen über eine Nut und ein Durchgangsloch. Für extrastarken Halt können sie mit Stift und Ring an deinem Schlagschrauber befestigt werden. Mit den Adaptern kannst du die Steckschlüsseleinsätze mit Schlagschraubern und Sechskantbits mit Impulsschraubern für alle leichteren Aufgaben unter 80 Nm Drehmoment verwenden.

attrval.textval: Highly efficient for installers, electricians, metalworkers, and woodworkers: Robust

cltextval.clText2000: Highly efficient for installers, electricians, metalworkers, and woodworkers: Robust
Äußerst effizient für Installateure, Elektriker, Metall- und Holzarbeiter: Robust

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Long Text
attrval.textval: The PRO Impact Metal Set includes strong and durable screwdriver bits and drill bits for installers, electricians, woodworkers, and metalworkers who need to drive screws and drill in metal.

cltextval.clText2000: The PRO Impact Metal Set includes strong and durable screwdriver bits and drill bits for installers, electricians, woodworkers, and metalworkers who need to drive screws and drill in metal.
Das PRO Impact Metal Set enthält starke und langlebige Schrauberbits und Bohrer für Installateure, Elektriker, Holz- und Metallarbeiter, die Schrauben eindrehen und in Metall bohren müssen.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: Need a set of strong screwdriver bits and metal drill bits to help you get your interior fitting jobs done? Try the PRO Impact Metal. We made the screwdriver bits from modified steel for strength and added laser markings to help you pick out the bit you need. The drill bits are made from HSS-G material to make sure you can drill in metal with ease.

cltextval.clText2000: Need a set of strong screwdriver bits and metal drill bits to help you get your interior fitting jobs done? Try the PRO Impact Metal. We made the screwdriver bits from modified steel for strength and added laser markings to help you pick out the bit you need. The drill bits are made from HSS-G material to make sure you can drill in metal with ease.

Benötigst du ein Set starker Schrauberbits und Metallbohrer, um deine Innenausbauarbeiten zu erledigen? Dann ist das PRO Impact Metal die richtige Wahl. Die Schrauberbits wurden aus modifiziertem Stahl für eine höhere Stabilität hergestellt. Durch die Lasermarkierungen kannst du den benötigten Bit im Handumdrehen auswählen. Die Bohrer bestehen aus HSS-G-Material, damit du Metall problemlos bearbeiten kannst.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The PRO Impact Metal Set is a great choice for interior fitters and installers who need reliable screwdriver bits and drill bits. The screwdriver bits feature a torsion zone, which absorbs the torque stress at the bits’ tip, making sure they won’t break. The bits have colour-coded rings indicating the head type and laser markings helping you pick out the bit you need. The metal drill bits, made from High-Speed Steel are ground for durability and precision. The set comes in a Pick and Click case you can use to keep your bits well organised.

cltextval.clText2000: The PRO Impact Metal Set is a great choice for interior fitters and installers who need reliable screwdriver bits and drill bits. The screwdriver bits feature a torsion zone, which absorbs the torque stress at the bits’ tip, making sure they won’t break. The bits have colour-coded rings indicating the head type and laser markings helping you pick out the bit you need. The metal drill bits, made from High-Speed Steel are ground for durability and precision. The set comes in a Pick and Click case you can use to keep your bits well organised.

Das PRO Impact Metal Set ist eine gute Wahl für Innenausbauer und Installateure, die zuverlässige Schrauberbits und Bohrer benötigen. Die Schrauberbits verfügen über eine Torsionszone, Drehmomentbelastungen werden an der Spitze der Bits absorbiert, um sicherzustellen, dass sie nicht brechen. Die Bits verfügen über farbcodierte Ringe, die den Kopftyp anzeigen und Lasermarkierungen, die dir bei der Auswahl helfen. Die Metallbohrer aus Schnellarbeitsstahl sind für Langlebigkeit und Präzision geschliffen. Das Set wird in einem Pick and Click-Koffer geliefert, in dem du deine Bits gut organisiert aufbewahren kannst.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: Need reliable screwdriver bits for your next screwdriving job? Bits that last long and perform well in heavy-duty applications? Try the PRO Impact Set. We designed the bits for strength and resistence to high torque. A Pick and Click bit holder helps you keep your bits well organised.

cltextval.clText2000: Need reliable screwdriver bits for your next screwdriving job? Bits that last long and perform well in heavy-duty applications? Try the PRO Impact Set. We designed the bits for strength and resistence to high torque. A Pick and Click bit holder helps you keep your bits well organised.

Benötigst du zuverlässige Schrauberbits für das Eindrehen von Schrauben? Bits, die lange halten und bei anspruchsvollen Anwendungen gut funktionieren? Dann ist das PRO Impact Set die richtige Wahl. Die Bits sind auf Stärke und Widerstandsfähigkeit gegenüber hohem Drehmoment ausgelegt. In einem Pick and Click-Bithalter kannst du deine Bits gut organisiert halten.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: PRO Impact Set is a great choice for installers looking for robust, heavy-duty screwdriver bits. The bits are made from heat-treated modified steel for outstanding strength and resistance to high torque. Their torsion zone absorbs the torque stress at the bits’ tip to make sure they won’t break. Each bit features a colour-coded ring indicating the head type and laser markings helping you pick out the size you need.

cltextval.clText2000: PRO Impact Set is a great choice for installers looking for robust, heavy-duty screwdriver bits. The bits are made from heat-treated modified steel for outstanding strength and resistance to high torque. Their torsion zone absorbs the torque stress at the bits’ tip to make sure they won’t break. Each bit features a colour-coded ring indicating the head type and laser markings helping you pick out the size you need.

Das PRO Impact Set ist eine gute Wahl für Installateure, die auf der Suche nach robusten Schrauberbits für harte Einsätze sind. Die Bits bestehen aus wärmebehandeltem, modifiziertem Stahl für hervorragende Stabilität und Widerstandsfähigkeit gegen hohe Drehmomente. Ihre Torsionszone absorbiert die Drehmomentbelastung an der Spitze der Bits, um sicherzustellen, dass sie nicht brechen. Die Bits haben einen farbcodierten Ring, der den Kopftyp anzeigt, sowie Lasermarkierungen, die dir bei der Auswahl der benötigten Größe helfen.

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Long Text
attrval.textval: The Compact Set, 43 pcs includes reliable hand tools and accessories for DIYers who need to get their screwdriving and drilling jobs done.

cltextval.clText2000: The Compact Set, 43 pcs includes reliable hand tools and accessories for DIYers who need to get their screwdriving and drilling jobs done.
Das Kompakt-Set mit 43 Teilen enthält zuverlässige Handwerkzeuge und Zubehör für Heimwerker, die ihre Schrauben- und Bohrarbeiten zu erledigen haben.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: A toolbox with a comprehensive set of quality accessories for most fastening and drilling tasks is essential for any DIYer. We designed our Compact Sets to make sure you have hand tools, screwdriver bits, and drill bits you need for the job – all safely stored and well organised in a strong case you can easily carry when you’re on the go.

cltextval.clText2000: A toolbox with a comprehensive set of quality accessories for most fastening and drilling tasks is essential for any DIYer. We designed our Compact Sets to make sure you have hand tools, screwdriver bits, and drill bits you need for the job – all safely stored and well organised in a strong case you can easily carry when you’re on the go.

Ein Werkzeugkasten mit einem umfassenden Sortiment hochwertiger Zubehörteile für die meisten Befestigungs- und Bohrarbeiten ist für jeden Heimwerker unentbehrlich. Wir haben unsere Kompakt-Sets so gestaltet, dass Sie Handwerkzeuge, Schraubendreher-Bit und Bohrer haben, die Sie für die Arbeit benötigen – alles sicher und gut organisiert in einem stabilen Koffer, den Sie unterwegs leicht mitnehmen können.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The Compact Set, 43 pcs includes a wide range of durable bits for fastening and drilling as well as a universal screwdriver with a comfortable design and grip for the ease of use. It offers screwdriver bits for all standard screw types and drill bits for metal and masonry. The accessories are housed in a strong case made from 30% recycled plastic. It's equipped with a transparent lid, indexes, and bit holders allowing you to see the content right away and easily find, pick up, and put back the accessories you need. Scroll down to see the exact content of each set and get the one that’s right for you.

cltextval.clText2000: The Compact Set, 43 pcs includes a wide range of durable bits for fastening and drilling as well as a universal screwdriver with a comfortable design and grip for the ease of use. It offers screwdriver bits for all standard screw types and drill bits for metal and masonry. The accessories are housed in a strong case made from 30% recycled plastic. It's equipped with a transparent lid, indexes, and bit holders allowing you to see the content right away and easily find, pick up, and put back the accessories you need. Scroll down to see the exact content of each set and get the one that’s right for you.

Das Kompakt-Set mit 43 Teilen enthält eine große Auswahl an langlebigen Bohrern zum Befestigen und Bohren sowie einen universellen Schraubendreher mit bequemem Design und Griff für einfache Handhabung. Es gibt Schrauberbits für alle Standard-Schraubentypen sowie Bohrer für Metall und Mauerwerk. Das Zubehör ist in einem robusten Kasten aus 30 % recyceltem Kunststoff untergebracht. Er ist mit einem transparenten Deckel, Registern und Bithaltern ausgestattet, sodass Sie den Inhalt sofort sehen und das benötigte Zubehör leicht finden, entnehmen und wieder zurücklegen können. Scrollen Sie nach unten, um den genauen Inhalt der einzelnen Sets zu sehen und das für Sie passende zu finden.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: A toolbox with a comprehensive set of quality accessories for most fastening and drilling tasks is essential for any DIYer. We designed our Basic Sets to make sure you have hand tools, screwdriver bits, and drill bits you need for the job – all safely stored and well organised in a strong case you can easily carry when you’re on the go.

cltextval.clText2000: A toolbox with a comprehensive set of quality accessories for most fastening and drilling tasks is essential for any DIYer. We designed our Basic Sets to make sure you have hand tools, screwdriver bits, and drill bits you need for the job – all safely stored and well organised in a strong case you can easily carry when you’re on the go.

Ein Werkzeugkasten mit einem umfassenden Sortiment hochwertiger Zubehörteile für die meisten Befestigungs- und Bohrarbeiten ist für jeden Heimwerker unentbehrlich. Wir haben unsere Basis-Sets so gestaltet, dass Sie Handwerkzeuge, Schraubenzieher-Bit und Bohrer zur Hand haben, die Sie für den Auftrag benötigen – alles sicher aufbewahrt und gut organisiert in einem stabilen Koffer, den Sie unterwegs problemlos mitnehmen können.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The Basic Set, 136 pcs includes a wide range of durable bits for fastening and drilling as well as hand tools with a comfortable design and grip for the ease of use. It offers screwdriver bits for all standard screw types, sockets for common bolt sizes, drill bits for metal, masonry, and wood as well as hole saws for wood and drywall. The accessories are housed in a strong case made from 30% recycled plastic. It's equipped with bit holders allowing you to easily find, pick up, and put back the accessories you need. Scroll down to see the exact content of the set and get the one that’s right for you.

cltextval.clText2000: The Basic Set, 136 pcs includes a wide range of durable bits for fastening and drilling as well as hand tools with a comfortable design and grip for the ease of use. It offers screwdriver bits for all standard screw types, sockets for common bolt sizes, drill bits for metal, masonry, and wood as well as hole saws for wood and drywall. The accessories are housed in a strong case made from 30% recycled plastic. It's equipped with bit holders allowing you to easily find, pick up, and put back the accessories you need. Scroll down to see the exact content of the set and get the one that’s right for you.

Das Kompakt-Set mit 136 Teilen enthält eine große Auswahl an langlebigen Bohrern zum Befestigen und Bohren sowie Handwerkzeuge mit bequemem Design und Griff für einfache Handhabung. Es bietet Schraubendreherbits für alle Standardschraubentypen, Steckschlüssel für gängige Bolzengrößen, Bohrer für Metall, Mauerwerk und Holz sowie Lochsägen für Holz und Trockenbauwand an. Das Zubehör ist in einem robusten Kasten aus 30 % recyceltem Kunststoff untergebracht. Er ist mit Bithaltern ausgestattet, sodass Sie das benötigte Zubehör leicht finden, aufheben und zurücklegen können. Scrollen Sie nach unten, um den genauen Inhalt der einzelnen Sets zu sehen und das für Sie passende zu finden.

cltextval.clText2000: A toolbox with a comprehensive set of quality accessories for most fastening and drilling tasks is essential for any DIYer. We designed our Starter Sets to make sure you have hand tools, screwdriver bits, and drill bits you need for the job – all safely stored and well organised in a strong case you can easily carry when you’re on the go.

Ein Werkzeugkasten mit einem umfassenden Sortiment hochwertiger Zubehörteile für die meisten Befestigungs- und Bohrarbeiten ist für jeden Heimwerker unentbehrlich. Wir haben unsere Starter-Sets so gestaltet, dass Sie Handwerkzeuge, Schraubenzieher-Bit und Bohrer zur Hand haben, die Sie für den Auftrag benötigen – alles sicher aufbewahrt und gut organisiert in einem stabilen Koffer, den Sie unterwegs problemlos mitnehmen können.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The Starter Set, 136 pcs includes a wide range of durable bits for fastening and drilling as well as hand tools with a comfortable design and grip for the ease of use. It offers screwdriver bits for all standard screw types, sockets for common bolt sizes, drill bits for metal, masonry, and wood as well as hole saws for wood and drywall. The accessories are housed in a strong case made from 30% recycled plastic. It's equipped with bit holders allowing you to easily find, pick up, and put back the accessories you need. Scroll down to see the exact content of the set and get the one that’s right for you.

cltextval.clText2000: The Starter Set, 136 pcs includes a wide range of durable bits for fastening and drilling as well as hand tools with a comfortable design and grip for the ease of use. It offers screwdriver bits for all standard screw types, sockets for common bolt sizes, drill bits for metal, masonry, and wood as well as hole saws for wood and drywall. The accessories are housed in a strong case made from 30% recycled plastic. It's equipped with bit holders allowing you to easily find, pick up, and put back the accessories you need. Scroll down to see the exact content of the set and get the one that’s right for you.

Das Starter-Set mit 136 Teilen enthält eine große Auswahl an langlebigen Bohrern zum Befestigen und Bohren sowie Handwerkzeuge mit bequemem Design und Griff für einfache Handhabung. Es bietet Schraubendreherbits für alle Standardschraubentypen, Steckschlüssel für gängige Bolzengrößen, Bohrer für Metall, Mauerwerk und Holz sowie Lochsägen für Holz und Trockenbauwand an. Das Zubehör ist in einem robusten Kasten aus 30 % recyceltem Kunststoff untergebracht. Er ist mit Bithaltern ausgestattet, sodass Sie das benötigte Zubehör leicht finden, aufheben und zurücklegen können. Scrollen Sie nach unten, um den genauen Inhalt der einzelnen Sets zu sehen und das für Sie passende zu finden.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: A toolbox with a comprehensive set of quality accessories for most fastening and drilling tasks is essential for any DIYer. We designed our All-in-one Sets to make sure you have hand tools, screwdriver bits, and drill bits you need for the job – all safely stored and well organised in a strong case you can easily carry when you’re on the go.

cltextval.clText2000: A toolbox with a comprehensive set of quality accessories for most fastening and drilling tasks is essential for any DIYer. We designed our All-in-one Sets to make sure you have hand tools, screwdriver bits, and drill bits you need for the job – all safely stored and well organised in a strong case you can easily carry when you’re on the go.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The All-in-one Set, 239 pcs includes a wide range of durable bits for fastening and drilling as well as hand tools with a comfortable design and improved grip for the ease of use. It offers screwdriver bits for all standard screw types, including precision bits, sockets and nutsetters for common bolt sizes, drill bits for metal, masonry, and wood as well as hole saws for wood and dywall. The accessories are housed in a strong case made from 30% recycled plastic. It's equipped with a transparent lid, indexes, and bit holders allowing you to see the content right away and easily find, pick up, and put back the accessories you need. Scroll down to check the exact content of the set to make sure you get the one that’s right for you.

cltextval.clText2000: The All-in-one Set, 239 pcs includes a wide range of durable bits for fastening and drilling as well as hand tools with a comfortable design and improved grip for the ease of use. It offers screwdriver bits for all standard screw types, including precision bits, sockets and nutsetters for common bolt sizes, drill bits for metal, masonry, and wood as well as hole saws for wood and dywall. The accessories are housed in a strong case made from 30% recycled plastic. It's equipped with a transparent lid, indexes, and bit holders allowing you to see the content right away and easily find, pick up, and put back the accessories you need. Scroll down to check the exact content of the set to make sure you get the one that’s right for you.

Das All-in-one-Set mit 239 Teilen enthält eine große Auswahl an langlebigen Bohrern zum Befestigen und Bohren sowie Handwerkzeuge mit bequemem Design und verbessertem Griff für einfache Handhabung. Es bietet Schraubendreherbits für alle Standardschraubentypendarunter Präzisionsbohrer, Steckschlüssel und Muttersetzer für gängige Schraubengrößen, Bohrer für Metall, Mauerwerk und Holz sowie Lochsägen für Holz und Trockenbauwand an. Das Zubehör ist in einem robusten Kasten aus 30 % recyceltem Kunststoff untergebracht. Er ist mit einem transparenten Deckel, Registern und Bithaltern ausgestattet, sodass Sie den Inhalt sofort sehen und das benötigte Zubehör leicht finden, entnehmen und wieder zurücklegen können. attrval.name: Short description (small)
attrval.textval: Faster grinding with less pressure thanks to Bosch Ceramic Technology

cltextval.clText2000: Faster grinding with less pressure thanks to Bosch Ceramic Technology
Schnelleres Schleifen mit weniger Druck dank Bosch Ceramic Technology

attrval.name: Short description (regular)
attrval.textval: Faster grinding with less pressure thanks to Bosch Ceramic Technology. Self-sharpening monocrystalline ceramic grains maintain consistent cutting speed throughout the entire disc’s lifetime.

cltextval.clText2000: Faster grinding with less pressure thanks to Bosch Ceramic Technology. Self-sharpening monocrystalline ceramic grains maintain consistent cutting speed throughout the entire disc’s lifetime.

Schnelleres Schleifen mit weniger Druck dank Bosch Ceramic Technology. Selbstschärfende monokristalline Keramikkörner sorgen während der gesamten Lebensdauer der Scheibe für eine konstante Schnittgeschwindigkeit.

attrval.name: Long text
attrval.textval: Thanks to Bosch Ceramic Technology, the flap discs grind faster with less pressure and heat. Self-sharpening ceramic grains fracture in a controlled way, exposing new sharp cutting edges. This means you get a consistent cutting speed throughout the disc’s lifetime, remove stock faster, and achieve a high-quality finish with ease.

cltextval.clText2000: Thanks to Bosch Ceramic Technology, the flap discs grind faster with less pressure and heat. Self-sharpening ceramic grains fracture in a controlled way, exposing new sharp cutting edges. This means you get a consistent cutting speed throughout the disc’s lifetime, remove stock faster, and achieve a high-quality finish with ease.

Dank Bosch Ceramic Technology schleifen die Klappscheiben schneller und mit weniger Druck und Wärmeentwicklung. Selbstschärfende Keramikkörner brechen kontrolliert ab und legen neue scharfe Schneidkanten frei. Dies bedeutet, dass die Trennscheibe während ihrer gesamten Lebensdauer eine konstante Schnittgeschwindigkeit bietet, Material schneller entfernt und mühelos eine hochwertige Oberfläche erzielt.

attrval.name: Specific RTB LoVs
attrval.textval: Self Sharpening Ceramic Grains - Not Prisma

cltextval.clText2000: Self Sharpening Ceramic Grains - Not Prisma

attrval.name: Short description (small)
attrval.textval: Consistent grinding speed thanks to self-sharpening ceramic grains

cltextval.clText2000: Consistent grinding speed thanks to self-sharpening ceramic grains

attrval.name: Short description (regular)
attrval.textval: The flap disc grinds faster for longer thanks to a self-sharpening effect. Each ceramic grain continuously exposes new sharp edges, helping you maintain a consistent grinding speed throughout the product’s lifetime.

cltextval.clText2000: The flap disc grinds faster for longer thanks to a self-sharpening effect. Each ceramic grain continuously exposes new sharp edges, helping you maintain a consistent grinding speed throughout the product’s lifetime.

Die Klappenscheibe schleift dank Selbstschärfeeffekt schneller und länger. Jedes Keramikkorn legt kontinuierlich neue scharfe Kanten frei, sodass die Scheibe während der gesamten Produktlebensdauer eine gleichmäßige Schleifgeschwindigkeit beibehält.

Der trimmbare Stützteller ermöglicht es, die Lebensdauer der Klappenscheibe zu verlängern

attrval.name: Short description (regular)
attrval.textval: You can trim the backing pad to make your flap disc last longer.

attrval.name: Performance Claim Text
attrval.textval: Designed for grinding, blending and finishing stainless steel, steel, and aluminium

cltextval.clText2000: Designed for grinding, blending and finishing stainless steel, steel, and aluminium

attrval.textval: Ideal for grinding, blending, and finishing metal

cltextval.clText2000: Ideal for grinding, blending, and finishing metal

attrval.name: Application Pic Close Up Long Text
attrval.textval: Ideal for grinding, blending, and finishing metal, eg stainless steel, steel, and aluminium

cltextval.clText2000: Ideal for grinding, blending, and finishing metal, eg stainless steel, steel, and aluminium

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Long Text
attrval.textval: The EXPERT X782 is an exceptionally efficient flap disc for metaloworkers who need to grind, blend, and finish stainless-steel, steel, and aluminium workpieces.

cltextval.clText2000: The EXPERT X782 is an exceptionally efficient flap disc for metaloworkers who need to grind, blend, and finish stainless-steel, steel, and aluminium workpieces.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: Flap discs are ideal for fast stock removal. They also allow you to grind, blend, and finish your workpieces with a single accessory. We designed the EXPERT X782 Flap Disc to help you complete all these tasks faster than before.

cltextval.clText2000: Flap discs are ideal for fast stock removal. They also allow you to grind, blend, and finish your workpieces with a single accessory. We designed the EXPERT X782 Flap Disc to help you complete all these tasks faster than before.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The EXPERT X782 is the fastest flap disc in our top-performing EXPERT range. We designed it for metalworkers, welders, and fabricators who want to grind metal quicker and more efficiently.

cltextval.clText2000: The EXPERT X782 is the fastest flap disc in our top-performing EXPERT range. We designed it for metalworkers, welders, and fabricators who want to grind metal quicker and more efficiently.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 3 (Call to action)
attrval.textval: Thanks to Bosch Ceramic Technology, the EXPERT X782 Flap Disc delivers speed and long-lasting performance. Its ceramic grains continuously expose sharp cutting edges, helping you grind faster and with less pressure. Our cooling ceramic coating prevents overheating and discoloration of stainless-steel workpieces. It also helps extend your angle grinder’s lifetime. The high-quality backing pad dampens vibrations and keeps the disc stable. The EXPERT X782 Flap Disc comes in two shapes. The flat discs are best for smoothening, blending, and finishing flat surfaces. The angled ones are designed for fast stock removal and working on contours, curves, or edges. The version with long flaps allows you to reach corners and tight spaces with ease. You can trim the backing pad to make your flap disc last longer.

cltextval.clText2000: Thanks to Bosch Ceramic Technology, the EXPERT X782 Flap Disc delivers speed and long-lasting performance. Its ceramic grains continuously expose sharp cutting edges, helping you grind faster and with less pressure. Our cooling ceramic coating prevents overheating and discoloration of stainless-steel workpieces. It also helps extend your angle grinder’s lifetime. The high-quality backing pad dampens vibrations and keeps the disc stable. The EXPERT X782 Flap Disc comes in two shapes. The flat discs are best for smoothening, blending, and finishing flat surfaces. The angled ones are designed for fast stock removal and working on contours, curves, or edges. The version with long flaps allows you to reach corners and tight spaces with ease. You can trim the backing pad to make your flap disc last longer.

cltextval.clText2000: Flap discs are ideal for fast stock removal. They also allow you to grind, blend, and finish your workpieces with a single accessory. We designed the EXPERT X782 Flap Disc to help you complete all these tasks faster than before.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The EXPERT X782 is the fastest flap disc in our top-performing EXPERT range. We designed it for metalworkers, welders, and fabricators who want to grind metal quicker and more efficiently.

cltextval.clText2000: The EXPERT X782 is the fastest flap disc in our top-performing EXPERT range. We designed it for metalworkers, welders, and fabricators who want to grind metal quicker and more efficiently.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 3 (Call to action)
attrval.textval: Thanks to Bosch Ceramic Technology, the EXPERT X782 Flap Disc delivers speed and long-lasting performance. Its ceramic grains continuously expose sharp cutting edges, helping you grind faster and with less pressure. Our cooling ceramic coating prevents overheating and discoloration of stainless-steel workpieces. It also helps extend your angle grinder’s lifetime. The high-quality backing pad dampens vibrations and keeps the disc stable. The EXPERT X782 Flap Disc comes in two shapes. The flat discs are best for smoothening, blending, and finishing flat surfaces. The angled ones are designed for fast stock removal and working on contours, curves, or edges. The version with long flaps allows you to reach corners and tight spaces with ease. You can trim the backing pad to make your flap disc last longer.

cltextval.clText2000: Thanks to Bosch Ceramic Technology, the EXPERT X782 Flap Disc delivers speed and long-lasting performance. Its ceramic grains continuously expose sharp cutting edges, helping you grind faster and with less pressure. Our cooling ceramic coating prevents overheating and discoloration of stainless-steel workpieces. It also helps extend your angle grinder’s lifetime. The high-quality backing pad dampens vibrations and keeps the disc stable. The EXPERT X782 Flap Disc comes in two shapes. The flat discs are best for smoothening, blending, and finishing flat surfaces. The angled ones are designed for fast stock removal and working on contours, curves, or edges. The version with long flaps allows you to reach corners and tight spaces with ease. You can trim the backing pad to make your flap disc last longer.

attrval.textval: Replacing deformed or rusty tape is easier when you work with a well-designed, high-quality fish tape. Our PRO Non-Conductive Fish Tape fits Bosch PRO GFT18V-30 Fish Tape, helping you place electrical cables efficiently.

Application Pic Close Up Long Text
attrval.textval: Ideal for cutting out grout from between tiles; removes even hard cement mortar; can also make small adjustment cuts to soft tiles

cltextval.clText2000: Ideal for cutting out grout from between tiles; removes even hard cement mortar; can also make small adjustment cuts to soft tiles
Ideal zum Ausschneiden von Fugenmörtel zwischen Fliesen; entfernt sogar harten Zementmörtel; kann auch kleine Anpassungsschnitte an weichen Fliesen vornehmen
Die Vielseitigkeit eines Multifunktionswerkzeugs bei maximaler Leistung

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Long Text
attrval.textval: The EXPERT ACZ 85 RD4 uses Bosch Diamond Technology and is long lasting and efficient. It's the best choice for tilers.

cltextval.clText2000: The EXPERT ACZ 85 RD4 uses Bosch Diamond Technology and is long lasting and efficient. It's the best choice for tilers.
Das EXPERT ACZ 85 RD4-Blatt nutzt die Bosch Diamanttechnologie, um es langlebig und effizient zu machen. Sie ist die erste Wahl für Fliesenleger.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: Removing old grout is a unique ability which has made the oscillating multitool a firm favourite with tilers and bathroom-fitters. But grouting mortar can be tough: only the best blades can survive the regular use professionals demand of their multitool.

cltextval.clText2000: Removing old grout is a unique ability which has made the oscillating multitool a firm favourite with tilers and bathroom-fitters. But grouting mortar can be tough: only the best blades can survive the regular use professionals demand of their multitool.

Das Entfernen von alten Fugenmassen ist eine einzigartige Fähigkeit, die das oszillierende Multifunktionswerkzeuge zu einem Favoriten bei Fliesenlegern und Badinstallateuren gemacht hat. Mörtel kann jedoch eine Herausforderung sein: Nur die besten Klingen können den regelmäßigen Anforderungen standhalten, die Profis an ihr Multitool stellen.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The EXPERT ACZ 85 RD4 offers extreme long life thanks to its advanced use of diamond. Bosch Diamond Technology provides a fine cutting edge of high-quality diamond grits that offer maximum wear-resistance in hard mortar. These grits are hard enough to bring another dimension to the blade: it can also make small adjustment cuts in soft tiles.

cltextval.clText2000: The EXPERT ACZ 85 RD4 offers extreme long life thanks to its advanced use of diamond. Bosch Diamond Technology provides a fine cutting edge of high-quality diamond grits that offer maximum wear-resistance in hard mortar. These grits are hard enough to bring another dimension to the blade: it can also make small adjustment cuts in soft tiles.

Das EXPERT ACZ 85 RD4-Blatt bietet dank des fortschrittlichen Diamanteinsatzes eine extrem lange Lebensdauer. Die Bosch Diamond Technology bietet eine feine Schneidekante aus hochwertigen Diamantkörnern, die maximale Verschleißfestigkeit in hartem Mörtel bieten. Diese Körnungen sind hart genug, um der Klinge eine neue Dimension zu verleihen: Sie können auch kleine Anpassungsschnitte in weichen Fliesen vornehmen.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 3 (Call to action)
attrval.textval: For tilers, plumbers and anyone needing to cut out grout, there is no substitute for diamond.

cltextval.clText2000: For tilers, plumbers and anyone needing to cut out grout, there is no substitute for diamond.
Für Fliesenleger, Klempner und alle, die Fugenmörtel ausschneiden müssen, sind Diamanten die allererste Wahl.

attrval.textval: Best for floor fitters, renovators, and carpenters: Long Life

cltextval.clText2000: Best for floor fitters, renovators, and carpenters: Long Life

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Long Text
attrval.textval: The EXPERT AIZ 32 BXPIT is an exceptionally durable multitool blade for floor fitters, renovators, and carpenters who want to cut hardwood floorboards and other hardwood workpieces.

cltextval.clText2000: The EXPERT AIZ 32 BXPIT is an exceptionally durable multitool blade for floor fitters, renovators, and carpenters who want to cut hardwood floorboards and other hardwood workpieces.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: When you install or restore hardwood floors, you need a blade that cuts wood cleanly, without breaking on old nails or leaving burn marks. The EXPERT AIZ 32 BXPIT Plunge Cut Blade keeps cutting even when it hits a nail or staple and delivers clean cuts without scorching your hardwood boards.

cltextval.clText2000: When you install or restore hardwood floors, you need a blade that cuts wood cleanly, without breaking on old nails or leaving burn marks. The EXPERT AIZ 32 BXPIT Plunge Cut Blade keeps cutting even when it hits a nail or staple and delivers clean cuts without scorching your hardwood boards.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: We made the sharp, cross-ground carbide teeth of the EXPERT AIZ 32 BXPIT using our innovative Carbide Technology. The teeth are exceptionally durable and allow you to make clean, smooth cuts in hardwood without worrying about burn marks. The extra coating makes the carbide even tougher. The blade's Curved-Tec design helps you deliver tear-free plunge cuts with ease.

cltextval.clText2000: We made the sharp, cross-ground carbide teeth of the EXPERT AIZ 32 BXPIT using our innovative Carbide Technology. The teeth are exceptionally durable and allow you to make clean, smooth cuts in hardwood without worrying about burn marks. The extra coating makes the carbide even tougher. The blade's Curved-Tec design helps you deliver tear-free plunge cuts with ease.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 3 (Call to action)
attrval.textval: We designed the EXPERT AIZ 32 BXPIT WoodMax for floor fitters, renovators, and carpenters who need to cut hardwood and want to work with more efficiency and less strain The multitool blade delivers clean cuts without burn marks even when you cut wood with metal.

cltextval.clText2000: We designed the EXPERT AIZ 32 BXPIT WoodMax for floor fitters, renovators, and carpenters who need to cut hardwood and want to work with more efficiency and less strain The multitool blade delivers clean cuts without burn marks even when you cut wood with metal.

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Short Text
attrval.textval: Popular with demolition and construction workers: Long Life

cltextval.clText2000: Popular with demolition and construction workers: Long Life

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Long Text
attrval.textval: The SDS plus-3C Set includes SDS plus-3C pointed and flat chisels as well as 3 SDS plus-1 Hammer Drill Bits. The trusted-quality set is a good choice for demolition and construction workers who need to chisel and drill in concrete.

cltextval.clText2000: The SDS plus-3C Set includes SDS plus-3C pointed and flat chisels as well as 3 SDS plus-1 Hammer Drill Bits. The trusted-quality set is a good choice for demolition and construction workers who need to chisel and drill in concrete.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: We made SDS max-3C Chisel and Drill Bit Set for construction and demolition workers who need reliable accessories to chisel and drill in concrete.

cltextval.clText2000: We made SDS max-3C Chisel and Drill Bit Set for construction and demolition workers who need reliable accessories to chisel and drill in concrete.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The SDS plus-3C Chisel Set includes long-lasting accessories for chiselling and drilling in concrete and brick effectively. The chisels are made from quality hardened steel for durability. Pointed chisels help create cracks and openings in the material to start breaking it up. They are suitable for demolition and correction work. Flat chisels are best for adjustment work, channeling for cables and pipework, restoring joints, and exposing reinforcements. The reliable SDS plus-1 Hammer Drill Bits allow you to drill in concrete and brick with confidence.

cltextval.clText2000: The SDS plus-3C Chisel Set includes long-lasting accessories for chiselling and drilling in concrete and brick effectively. The chisels are made from quality hardened steel for durability. Pointed chisels help create cracks and openings in the material to start breaking it up. They are suitable for demolition and correction work. Flat chisels are best for adjustment work, channeling for cables and pipework, restoring joints, and exposing reinforcements. The reliable SDS plus-1 Hammer Drill Bits allow you to drill in concrete and brick with confidence.

attrval.textval: The PRO AIZ 45 APIB is a durable plunge cut blade for floorlayers and woodworkers who need to undercut door jambs and make plunge cuts and cut-outs in wood, soft metal, and plastic.

cltextval.clText2000: The PRO AIZ 45 APIB is a durable plunge cut blade for floorlayers and woodworkers who need to undercut door jambs and make plunge cuts and cut-outs in wood, soft metal, and plastic.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: When you need to undercut door jambs, an oscillating multitool with the right blade is simply the best choice for the job. We designed the PRO AIZ 45 APIB Plunge Cut Blade to make sure you can undercut door jambs and make precise plunge cuts and cut-outs in many materials – efficiently and with ease.

cltextval.clText2000: When you need to undercut door jambs, an oscillating multitool with the right blade is simply the best choice for the job. We designed the PRO AIZ 45 APIB Plunge Cut Blade to make sure you can undercut door jambs and make precise plunge cuts and cut-outs in many materials – efficiently and with ease.

cltextval.clText2000: When you need to undercut door jambs, an oscillating multitool with the right blade is simply the best choice for the job. attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The PRO AIZ 45 BSPIB Plunge Cut Blade is made from bi-metal for strength and endurance. It has coated Japan teeth, which make it extra durable and enable aggressive and fast cuts in hardwood with reduced burning. The blade's Curved-Tec design and 45-mm width make it ideal for undercutting door jambs and tear-free plunge cuts.

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Long Text
attrval.textval: The EXPERT Multi Material PC Plus Countersink Hole Saw is built with Bosch Carbide Technology for exceptional durability. It's the best choice for electricians who need to cut holes in a range of hard materials.

cltextval.clText2000: The EXPERT Multi Material PC Plus Countersink Hole Saw is built with Bosch Carbide Technology for exceptional durability. It's the best choice for electricians who need to cut holes in a range of hard materials.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: As an electrician, you often need to cut round holes for flush-mount electrical boxes. This task can be tricky, because not every hole saw handles a variety of hard materials equally well. The EXPERT Multi Material PC Plus Countersink does. It not only helps you cut through tile, brick, wood with nails, drywall, and plastic, but also cuts a recess around the hole, so you can install electrical boxes without extra steps.

cltextval.clText2000: As an electrician, you often need to cut round holes for flush-mount electrical boxes. This task can be tricky, because not every hole saw handles a variety of hard materials equally well. The EXPERT Multi Material PC Plus Countersink does. It not only helps you cut through tile, brick, wood with nails, drywall, and plastic, but also cuts a recess around the hole, so you can install electrical boxes without extra steps.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: Each tooth of the EXPERT Multi Material PC Plus Countersink is made from the hardest metal using Bosch Carbide Technology. It's then laser-welded and ground for the perfect cutting shape. This makes the hole saw ideal for the toughest jobs and all-around work alike. Thanks to the integrated countersink cutting edge, teh hole saw also cuts a recess around the hole, helping you install flush-mount electrical boxes more efficiently.

cltextval.clText2000: Each tooth of the EXPERT Multi Material PC Plus Countersink is made from the hardest metal using Bosch Carbide Technology. It's then laser-welded and ground for the perfect cutting shape. This makes the hole saw ideal for the toughest jobs and all-around work alike. Thanks to the integrated countersink cutting edge, teh hole saw also cuts a recess around the hole, helping you install flush-mount electrical boxes more efficiently.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 3 (Call to action)
attrval.textval: The Bosch EXPERT Multi Material PC Plus Countersink is a great all-rounder for professionals who want to efficiently cut through a range of hard materials and create a recess around the hole – all in one step.

cltextval.clText2000: The Bosch EXPERT Multi Material PC Plus Countersink is a great all-rounder for professionals who want to efficiently cut through a range of hard materials and create a recess around the hole – all in one step.

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Long Text
attrval.textval: The PRO Construction Material Threaded is a durable hole saw for plumbers and electricians who need to cut holes in construction materials.

cltextval.clText2000: The PRO Construction Material Threaded is a durable hole saw for plumbers and electricians who need to cut holes in construction materials.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: Plumbers and electricians working on construction and renovation projects often need to cut holes through a wide range of construction materials every day. We designed the PRO Construction Materials Hole Saw to help them cut holes through brick, drywall, wood, and plastic with ease – time and again.

cltextval.clText2000: Plumbers and electricians working on construction and renovation projects often need to cut holes through a wide range of construction materials every day. We designed the PRO Construction Materials Hole Saw to help them cut holes through brick, drywall, wood, and plastic with ease – time and again.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The PRO Construction Materials Hole Saw uses strong carbide teeth to make sure you can cut through hard construction materials effectively. The U-shaped tooth seats provide a strong connection between the teeth and the steel body, improving durability. Large slots remove chips efficiently, helping you complete your tasks faster.

cltextval.clText2000: The PRO Construction Materials Hole Saw uses strong carbide teeth to make sure you can cut through hard construction materials effectively. The U-shaped tooth seats provide a strong connection between the teeth and the steel body, improving durability. Large slots remove chips efficiently, helping you complete your tasks faster.

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Long Text
attrval.textval: The PRO Construction Material Threaded Hole Saw Set includes durable hole saws with 2 arbors, 2 pilot drill bits and a case for convenient storage. It's a highly effcient set for plumbers and electricians who need to cut holes in construction materials.

cltextval.clText2000: The PRO Construction Material Threaded Hole Saw Set includes durable hole saws with 2 arbors, 2 pilot drill bits and a case for convenient storage. It's a highly effcient set for plumbers and electricians who need to cut holes in construction materials.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: Plumbers and electricians working on construction and renovation projects often need to cut holes through a wide range of construction materials every day. We designed the PRO Construction Materials Hole Saw to help them cut holes through brick, drywall, wood, and plastic with ease – time and again.

cltextval.clText2000: Plumbers and electricians working on construction and renovation projects often need to cut holes through a wide range of construction materials every day. We designed the PRO Construction Materials Hole Saw to help them cut holes through brick, drywall, wood, and plastic with ease – time and again.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The PRO Construction Materials Hole Saw uses strong carbide teeth to make sure you can cut through hard construction materials effectively. The U-shaped tooth seats provide a strong connection between the teeth and the steel body, improving durability. Large slots remove chips efficiently, helping you complete your tasks faster. The set also includes arbors with HSS-G and Tungsten Carbide Tipped (TCT) pilot drill bits as well as a Hex Key.

cltextval.clText2000: The PRO Construction Materials Hole Saw uses strong carbide teeth to make sure you can cut through hard construction materials effectively. The U-shaped tooth seats provide a strong connection between the teeth and the steel body, improving durability. Large slots remove chips efficiently, helping you complete your tasks faster. The set also includes arbors with HSS-G and Tungsten Carbide Tipped (TCT) pilot drill bits as well as a Hex Key.

cltextval.clText2000: The PRO Construction Material Threaded Hole Saw Starter Kit includes a durable hole saw with an arbor and 2 pilot drill bits (HSS-G and TCT). It's a highly efficient kit for plumbers and electricians who need to cut 68mm holes in construction materials.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: Plumbers and electricians working on construction and renovation projects often need to cut holes through a wide range of construction materials every day. We designed the PRO Construction Materials Hole Saw to help them cut holes through brick, drywall, wood, and plastic with ease – time and again.

cltextval.clText2000: Plumbers and electricians working on construction and renovation projects often need to cut holes through a wide range of construction materials every day. We designed the PRO Construction Materials Hole Saw to help them cut holes through brick, drywall, wood, and plastic with ease – time and again.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The PRO Construction Materials Hole Saw uses strong carbide teeth to make sure you can cut through hard construction materials effectively. The U-shaped tooth seats provide a strong connection between the teeth and the steel body, improving durability. Large slots remove chips efficiently, helping you complete your tasks faster. The set includes a hole saw arbor as well as HSS-G and Tungsten Carbide Tipped (TCT) pilot drill bits.

The U-shaped tooth seats provide a strong connection between the teeth and the steel body, improving durability. Large slots remove chips efficiently, helping you complete your tasks faster. attrval.textval: Bosch EPA Flat Pleated Filters are rectangular replacement filters for Bosch GAS 18V-6LS vacuum cleaner.
