attrval.textval: Best for construction and rescue workers: long lasting and efficient

cltextval.clText2000: Best for construction and rescue workers: long lasting and efficient

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Long Text
attrval.textval: The EXPERT Metal Diamond Cutting Disc uses Bosch Diamond Technology and is long lasting and efficient. It's the best choice for construction workers who want to cut metal with their angle grinder.

cltextval.clText2000: The EXPERT Metal Diamond Cutting Disc uses Bosch Diamond Technology and is long lasting and efficient. It's the best choice for construction workers who want to cut metal with their angle grinder.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: Diamond cutting discs are strong enough to cut steel and cast iron effectively, but they are often excessively loud. The EXPERT Metal Diamond Cutting Disc delivers powerful cutting performance with much less noise, helping you reduce strain on the jobsite.

cltextval.clText2000: Diamond cutting discs are strong enough to cut steel and cast iron effectively, but they are often excessively loud. The EXPERT Metal Diamond Cutting Disc delivers powerful cutting performance with much less noise, helping you reduce strain on the jobsite.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The EXPERT Metal Diamond Cutting Disc is made using Bosch Diamond Technology for exceptional strength and durability. Thanks to the specially designed cutouts filled with heat-resistant silicon, it cuts with less noise. The disc’s cutting edge is made from high-quality, uniform diamond grits fixed to the steel body. This means the disc lasts longer than even the best bonded discs and maintains a constant cutting depth and speed throughout its lifetime. Plus, it doesn’t shatter when you drop it and produces no chemical smell or extra dust when you cut. The EXPERT Metal is not suitable for cutting aluminium, concrete, or stone.

cltextval.clText2000: The EXPERT Metal Diamond Cutting Disc is made using Bosch Diamond Technology for exceptional strength and durability. Thanks to the specially designed cutouts filled with heat-resistant silicon, it cuts with less noise. The disc’s cutting edge is made from high-quality, uniform diamond grits fixed to the steel body. This means the disc lasts longer than even the best bonded discs and maintains a constant cutting depth and speed throughout its lifetime. Plus, it doesn’t shatter when you drop it and produces no chemical smell or extra dust when you cut. The EXPERT Metal is not suitable for cutting aluminium, concrete, or stone.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 3 (Call to action)
attrval.textval: For metalworkers and professionals in the construction industry who need a hard-wearing cutting disc and want to work with less cutting noise, the EXPERT Metal Diamond Cutting Disc offers a whole new way of cutting metal. Less noise, less strain – the same EXPERT performance.

cltextval.clText2000: For metalworkers and professionals in the construction industry who need a hard-wearing cutting disc and want to work with less cutting noise, the EXPERT Metal Diamond Cutting Disc offers a whole new way of cutting metal. Less noise, less strain – the same EXPERT performance.

attrval.name: Product Headline
attrval.textval: EXPERT Metal for Long Life cutting metal with less noise

cltextval.clText2000: EXPERT Metal for Long Life cutting metal with less noise

attrval.name: Performance Claim Text
attrval.textval: Lasts up to 50x longer than a Bosch Metal Cutting Disc

cltextval.clText2000: Lasts up to 50x longer than a Bosch Metal Cutting Disc

attrval.name: Application Pic Close Up Short Text
attrval.textval: Ideal for cutting tough metal with less noise

cltextval.clText2000: Ideal for cutting tough metal with less noise

attrval.name: Application Pic Close Up Long Text
attrval.textval: Ideal for cutting tough metal with less noise, eg cast iron, rebar, steel, stainless steel as well as non-ferrous metals including copper, brass and fibre glass, not suitable for cutting aluminium, concrete or stone

cltextval.clText2000: Ideal for cutting tough metal with less noise, eg cast iron, rebar, steel, stainless steel as well as non-ferrous metals including copper, brass and fibre glass, not suitable for cutting aluminium, concrete or stone

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Short Text
attrval.textval: Best for construction and rescue workers: long lasting and efficient

cltextval.clText2000: Best for construction and rescue workers: long lasting and efficient

attrval.name: Application Pic Wide Long Text
attrval.textval: The EXPERT Metal Diamond Cutting Disc uses Bosch Diamond Technology and is long lasting and efficient. It's the best choice for construction workers who want to cut metal with their angle grinder.

cltextval.clText2000: The EXPERT Metal Diamond Cutting Disc uses Bosch Diamond Technology and is long lasting and efficient. It's the best choice for construction workers who want to cut metal with their angle grinder.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 1 (User Challenge)
attrval.textval: Diamond cutting discs are strong enough to cut steel and cast iron effectively, but they are often excessively loud. The EXPERT Metal Diamond Cutting Disc delivers powerful cutting performance with much less noise, helping you reduce strain on the jobsite.

cltextval.clText2000: Diamond cutting discs are strong enough to cut steel and cast iron effectively, but they are often excessively loud. The EXPERT Metal Diamond Cutting Disc delivers powerful cutting performance with much less noise, helping you reduce strain on the jobsite.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 2 (Bosch Solution)
attrval.textval: The EXPERT Metal Diamond Cutting Disc is made using Bosch Diamond Technology for exceptional strength and durability. Thanks to the specially designed cutouts filled with heat-resistant silicon, it cuts with less noise. The disc’s cutting edge is made from high-quality, uniform diamond grits fixed to the steel body. This means the disc lasts longer than even the best bonded discs and maintains a constant cutting depth and speed throughout its lifetime. Plus, it doesn’t shatter when you drop it and produces no chemical smell or extra dust when you cut. The EXPERT Metal is not suitable for cutting aluminium, concrete, or stone.

cltextval.clText2000: The EXPERT Metal Diamond Cutting Disc is made using Bosch Diamond Technology for exceptional strength and durability. Thanks to the specially designed cutouts filled with heat-resistant silicon, it cuts with less noise. The disc’s cutting edge is made from high-quality, uniform diamond grits fixed to the steel body. This means the disc lasts longer than even the best bonded discs and maintains a constant cutting depth and speed throughout its lifetime. Plus, it doesn’t shatter when you drop it and produces no chemical smell or extra dust when you cut. The EXPERT Metal is not suitable for cutting aluminium, concrete, or stone.

attrval.name: Editors Copy Part 3 (Call to action)
attrval.textval: For metalworkers and professionals in the construction industry who need a hard-wearing cutting disc and want to work with less cutting noise, the EXPERT Metal Diamond Cutting Disc offers a whole new way of cutting metal. Less noise, less strain – the same EXPERT performance.

cltextval.clText2000: For metalworkers and professionals in the construction industry who need a hard-wearing cutting disc and want to work with less cutting noise, the EXPERT Metal Diamond Cutting Disc offers a whole new way of cutting metal. Less noise, less strain – the same EXPERT performance.
